rationale_overall: Quiet quarter at the cap=8 ceiling: the watchlist is already thematically saturated across the profile's named waves (AI via MSFT and NVDA, robotics via ISRG, demographics via LLY, quantum via QTUM, nuclear via NLR, geopolitical-energy via LNG, rockets via RKLB), and Q2 2025 did not surface a fundamental thesis breach for any holding nor a new candidate strong enough to displace one. Tailwinds for the existing names actually firmed up - Trump's May 23 executive orders accelerating SMR licensing reinforce the NLR nuclear thesis, LLY's April orforglipron Phase 3 oral GLP-1 readout was strongly positive and extended the aging-demographics thesis, NVDA's May 28 Q1 FY26 print showed Blackwell ramping cleanly, and RKLB's Neutron program is tracking 2H 2025 debut - so the right call is to hold and let the optimizer re-weight next quarter rather than churn for the sake of activity.
